title: Result Unwrap
description: Understand the Result enum by using the unwrap or expect methods to handle potential errors.
problemStatement:
Success or Failure! Call a function that returns a `Result<i32, String>`. Use the `.unwrap()` method to get the value, assuming it will succeed (but be aware this crashes on failure!).

**Requirement:** Print the unwrapped value.
hints: In production, `unwrap()` is often avoided in favor of more robust error handling.
